title: Water Physics Overhaul
body:
**Requires **[***SKDS Core***](https://modrinth.com/mod/skds-core)** !**

It will add a new mechanic to the game that makes survival much more difficult, and making it much more interesting - Fluid Physics.

 ![piston and water](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pXIm49wN/images/05977106ecf6f037aef9a7e522a6273cbe50bba4.gif)


There is physics for all fluids, water, lava and others, from any mod.
This mod will remove the infinite water source and break all vanilla mob farms.

 ![placing block into water](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pXIm49wN/images/ac87fad70b70a73298c4b03e0358d75215feaa29.gif)

Placing a block in water will not destroy it, but push it out. Water can also be pushed with pistons to make simple mechanisms.

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pXIm49wN/images/ffc0a14a6417a190b790bc8505ca6436293a7c54.gif)

If you have any ideas or find bugs, I would be glad if you report it.


See also:\
[Block Physics Overhaul](https://modrinth.com/mod/bpo)
